overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic NCPD police car driving through a narrow, wet alley in Night City. The camera tracks the vehicle from behind before moving alongside to reveal the scrolling LED display on the car's side, with neon-lit buildings and reflective wet pavement creating atmospheric cyberpunk visuals.

narrow street with reflective wet surface showing neon light reflections

tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-angle rear view of an NCPD police car driving through a narrow, wet alley in Night City. The vehicle's tail lights glow red against the reflective asphalt, while neon-lit skyscrapers loom in the background. The camera tracks smoothly behind the car as it proceeds through the enclosed urban corridor.

events.description: camera begins moving from rear position to left side of the police car

agents.ego_description: transitioning from rear tracking to side view while maintaining pace with the police car

digital LED panel on car door showing scrolling white text

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from behind to the left side of the police car, revealing the vehicle's aggressive front grill with horizontal LED bars and the digital side display beginning to scroll text. The alley walls remain close on both sides, with the wet pavement continuing to reflect the ambient neon lighting from nearby buildings.

events.description: police car's roof light bar flashes red and blue lights reflecting off wet walls

agents.ego_description: maintaining parallel position alongside the police car to showcase the scrolling LED side display

notable_agents.action: police car driving with active scrolling LED text reading NCPD POLICE

entered.detail: emergency light bar with red and blue LED arrays flashing on roof

segments.scene_description: The camera tracks perfectly alongside the police car, showcasing the full side profile with the scrolling LED matrix display clearly showing NCPD POLICE text. The roof-mounted emergency light bar flashes red and blue, reflecting off the wet alley walls. The vehicle continues its slow patrol through the neon-lit corridor, with building overhangs visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a trailing perspective of a police vehicle into a detailed side-profile track through a neon-lit urban corridor. It begins with a low-angle rear view of an NCPD police car driving through a narrow, wet alley, where red tail lights glow against reflective asphalt beneath looming skyscrapers. As the vehicle proceeds, the camera smoothly arcs from the rear to the left side, revealing the aggressive front grill and the start of a scrolling digital display. The scene then shifts into a perfect parallel track, showcasing the full side profile and the flashing red and blue emergency lights reflecting off the damp alley walls. Finally, the camera maintains this alongside position as the car continues its slow patrol under building overhangs, with the LED matrix clearly displaying NCPD POLICE text.
